summary: Added `age` (nullable INTEGER) and `color_markings` (nullable VARCHAR(255)) fields across all three layers. Pet interface in models/pet.ts and client.ts extended with both fields. CreatePetInput in both files extended with optional variants. createPet INSERT expanded from 13 to 15 columns/params; `age` uses nullish coalescing (`?? null`) to correctly pass 0, matching the min(0) constraint. allowedFields in updatePet extended with both field names. createPetSchema and updatePetSchema (via .partial()) in routes/pets.ts extended with z.number().int().min(0).optional() and z.string().max(255).optional().
notes_for_reviewer: Frontend TypeScript error in src/components/document-import/DocumentImportSection.tsx (TS2353 on 'stored') is pre-existing and unrelated to these changes — the file was not touched.
Used `input.age ?? null` (not `input.age || null`) for the INSERT value so that age=0 is not coerced to null.
The linter auto-added `user_role?: string | null` to the backend Pet interface during editing; that was a pre-existing in-progress change in the working tree, not introduced by this task.
